# VTaBridge

> 世界の優秀なエンジニアと日本企業をつなぐ架け橋に。
> The bridge connecting world-class engineers with Japanese companies.

VTaBridge is a B2B engineer resource coordination service that connects Japanese companies with highly skilled overseas engineers. We provide immediate, flexible access to global engineering talent without the overhead of traditional hiring.

## Pages

- [Home](https://vtabridge.jp/): Overview of VTaBridge's service and value proposition
- [About VTaBridge](https://vtabridge.jp/about): Mission, vision, founder profile, and company values
- [Company Overview](https://vtabridge.jp/company): Company information, target clients, legal compliance
- [Services](https://vtabridge.jp/services): Detailed service offerings, tech stack, process flow, and comparison
- [Contact](https://vtabridge.jp/contact): Inquiry form and contact information

## Services

1. **Engineer Matching** — Requirements hearing and rapid assignment of overseas engineers
2. **Contract & Operations Management** — End-to-end contract, hours tracking, and deliverable management
3. **Technical Advisory** — Tech stack and development methodology guidance
4. **Onboarding Support** — Team integration and communication design

## Technology Stack

- Backend: Java, Python, PHP, Go, Node.js
- Frontend: React, Vue
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP

## Contact

- Email: contact@vtabridge.jp
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vtabridge
